questions.question: Describe the importance of information delivery in a data warehousing environment, and explain the role of end-users in determining the effectiveness of this process.

A company has implemented a data warehouse to support business intelligence. However, the reports generated from the warehouse are not being used by the management team. What could be the reasons for this, and how can the company improve the information delivery process?
What are the different types of end-users that can benefit from a well-designed data warehouse, and how can data quality issues impact the information delivery process?
